textByHashes.9181d2d1eca5b8d29f474133b8b95d1464900652: Oh..what am I to do, Christmas is ruined.
textByHashes.4386c813a0d4516c9bad7ac97968ec9ffb9e0f95: Christmas is ruined, my bakery is ruined, everything is ruined!
textByHashes.5381266e25c8a89d66ef038d8be1a6db46f1c4bc: Adventurer! You've come at the right time. I need your help.
textByHashes.207fc9e26990e510f4334a42289d3390dcf4f824: He has been an absolute disaster, he suddenly showed up and took control of our bakery. We tried to stop him, but he locked up the two other bakers!
textByHashes.4dcd598dd9249c813c594178c990dde324109e2c: Well... I don't think he knows how Gingerbread Gnomes are made, he brought in an Icelord to ice the gingerbread.
textByHashes.9f14eb56039ca5a235eae5a67895b43657b5caaa: I threw a stone at it to cause a distraction, giving me a chance to escape. After I got out, I heard Jack lock the entrance behind me.
textByHashes.b0346838f44c40768bb944ac4aed07c524c56cbf: It's terrifying! I think Jack must have a few screws loose to think that was a good idea.
textByHashes.108196d43aa164c00de6da0ca811719b883ac7b6: Please hurry, we need to restart production as soon as possible.
textByHashes.03555a4d76985d848bc30936c57a978c0604efbd: Have you managed to free the other bakers and stop Jack Frost yet?
textByHashes.435332b06e8581e7509d45db225485691cc0e7f9: Hurry we need to get back into production, before it's too late.
